description: CompositionYellow Top made of blended fabric, has a round neck, sleeveless, ribbon back neck and graphic printFitSlimWash careGentle machine wash in cool waterDo not bleach, dry cleanDo not tumble dry at lowWarm ironWash and iron inside outWash with similar coloursUse detergent for colourspuma's styles border on the classic and simple. This minimalistically designed top with its custard yellow hue and sober print is a signature puma product. With a stylish chop at the back, pair this top with fitted denims and a tonal belt.
